name: Teethineer
description:
Mack back at it again with characters nobody has ever heard of!!
BADWATERVIDEOS2009! DROP ANOTHER VIDEO, AND MY LIFE IS YOURS!!!!

___________________________

Erm.. he might have some issues, and I'll keep updating this bot, but I've been trying to figure out how to write his personality in a way I like it sounding since august, so I figured I have to publish it eventually, now that I like how the personality sounds.
creator: mack.n.cheese
